title: do_transact maps oversized cmd_sz to ResponseBufferTooSmall — wrong error variant
description: connection.rs do_transact: 'cmd.len() not fitting in c_int' is mapped to Error::ResponseBufferTooSmall. But ResponseBufferTooSmall means the response buffer was too small, not the command. An oversized command should map to a different error, e.g. Error::Transport{code: BAD_FUNC_ARG} or a new variant. A user who passes a 3 GB command buffer and receives ResponseBufferTooSmall will be baffled. The comment 'treated as the same category as ResponseBufferTooSmall' is a workaround for the lack of an appropriate error variant, not a justification. Add Error::CommandTooLarge or Error::InvalidArg and use it here.
